title: Make alignment pulse and task triage cadence lifecycle-native
description: v1.9.0 established lifecycle-native project memory updates for the main covered commands, but alignment pulse, task triage, and operating self-audit are still maintained mostly as note-driven cadence instead of being refreshed naturally through the runtime loop.
triage_notes: Next focus after v1.9.0 release. Decide how alignment pulse outputs, stale-task review, and framework self-audit cadence become first-class runtime behavior instead of manual follow-up notes.
